expectations.text: Proposes specific next actions (not vague 'consider engaging')
expectations.evidence: Concrete actions: primary 600-900 word piece, 3-4 atomized social posts, ship within 5 days

expectations.text: References specific handles/accounts from the input signals
expectations.evidence: References the 4 accounts, 3 accounts, and 2 pipeline prospects as described in the input signals

expectations.text: Distinguishes reaction-window (act now) from learning-window (study pattern)
expectations.evidence: 'Why now, not later' section names live wave, 5-day ship window, warns about topic going stale

expectations.text: Identifies cross-cutting theme (AI threat to distinctive voice = RP's exact territory)
expectations.evidence: 'Two threads are one topic — what gets lost when organizations optimize for safety' merges AI + safe messaging

expectations.text: Proposes a specific angle or hook Isaac could write, not just 'write about AI'
expectations.evidence: Proposes titled piece 'The Thing You Won't Say Is The Thing That Would Work' plus 4 concrete hooks

expectations.text: Uses the 2-prospects-sharing signal to inform urgency or positioning
expectations.evidence: Notes prospects already emotionally engaged, piece 'gives them language to explain to their stakeholders'
